set.body: baseline.csv tracks 6 ops but benchmark-regression.R runs 15; nine ops (chol, solve_rhs, eigen_sym, svd, sinkhorn, spmv, spmm, block_lanczos, svd_factor_subspace) execute every run but are never baselined, so regressions are invisible. 23 of 26 benchmark scripts are orphans referenced nowhere. planning_docs/quality-tracking.md lists ~56 exported ops with no benchmark row. This phase baselines the 9 runnable ops, triages the orphans with an explicit keep/delete/move decision, generalizes the rel_sv_err accuracy check from benchmark-svd-backends.R into a shared helper, and locks the coverage table to the harness dispatch list.
set.title: P2: Close coverage and triage orphan scripts
